snippet.title: Street Fighter | Official Trailer (2026 Movie)
snippet.description:
FIGHT! Watch the Official Trailer for #StreetFighterMovie, hitting theaters everywhere October 16.  

Set in 1993, estranged Street Fighters Ryu (Andrew Koji) and Ken Masters (Noah Centineo) are thrown back into combat when the mysterious Chun-Li (Callina Liang) recruits them for the next World Warrior Tournament: a brutal clash of fists, fate, and fury. But behind this battle royale lies a deadly conspiracy that forces them to face off against each other and the demons of their past. And if they don’t, it’s GAME OVER!

Helmed by director Kitao Sakurai, Street Fighter is set to bring the battle from the arcade to the big screen with Hadoukens, roundhouses, and all your favorite characters.

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday - First Trailer "The Last Thunder God" | Chris Hemsworth | 2026
snippet.description:
#Avengers #marvelstudios #robertdowneyjr 

Watch the 'FAN (CONCEPT) Trailer Concept' For Marvel Studios' Avengers: Doomsday (2026) (More Info About This Video Down Below!)


Avengers: Doomsday marks a major escalation in the Marvel universe as a new global and multiversal crisis forces Earth’s mightiest heroes into their most dangerous battle yet. With reality itself beginning to fracture, the emergence of Doctor Doom introduces a threat defined by intelligence, precision, and absolute ambition. The trailer sets a darker tone, showcasing large-scale destruction, collapsing worlds, and heroes struggling to maintain control in an increasingly unstable environment. As new and returning characters come together, the line between survival and defeat becomes thinner than ever.

The story explores a future where power alone may not be enough to stop what is coming, as Doom’s influence spreads through strategy, technology, and manipulation across multiple realities. The Avengers must face not only a powerful enemy, but also the consequences of a universe already pushed to its limits. Alliances are tested, leadership is challenged, and every decision carries weight beyond a single timeline. With massive action sequences, high emotional stakes, and strong crossover potential, Avengers: Doomsday stands as one of Marvel’s most ambitious projects, centered on collapse, resistance, and the fight to protect the future of the multiverse.

Editing, VFX, SFX, Thumbnail by @GalacticTrailerOfficial 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Software I use: Adobe Premiere, After Effects, Photoshop, Adobe Audition, Unreal Engine 5.5
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------

◁ On our channel, we create trailer mashups ▷ Trailer mashups, also known as recut trailers, are crafted by gathering various film footage from one or more movies and re-editing them to form a brand-new trailer. These mashups often depict a movie that doesn’t exist or shift the genre of an existing film. As derivative works defined under the United States Copyright Act 17 U.S.C. § 101, they may be protected from copyright claims under the fair use doctrine.

Trailer mashups are not just a form of user-generated digital creativity but also a unique way to build excitement for upcoming releases, complementing official movie trailers. While traditional trailers tease the plot and generate hype, fan-made mashups let the audience put their own cinematic twist on existing footage. This creative freedom can spotlight a particular actor, emphasize a specific storyline, or even transform the film’s genre entirely.

snippet.title: Céline Dion - Dansons (Vidéo officielle)
snippet.description:
Céline Dion - Dansons (Vidéo officielle)

À propos du réalisateur : « Max Allouche est un jeune auteur et réalisateur de mini-séries sur Instagram qui célèbrent l’amour et les rencontres. Très actif sur les réseaux, il a proposé à différents artistes (chanteur, humoriste, violoniste, danseuse) de participer à ce clip. On peut retrouver la grande danseuse classique Victoria Dauberville et son conjoint Mathieu Forget, la violoniste Esther Abrami, l’humoriste Lola Dubini et la jeune artiste Oria entre autres »
//
About the director: Max Allouche is a young writer and director of mini-series on Instagram that celebrate love and new encounters. Highly active on social media, he invited various artists (a singer, a comedian, a violinist and a dancer) to take part in this music video. Featured artists include the renowned classical dancer Victoria Dauberville and her partner Mathieu Forget, violinist Esther Abrami, comedian Lola Dubini and the young artist Oria, amongst others.”

Max Allouche – https://www.instagram.com/maxallou
Victoria Dauberville - www.youtube.com/@victoriadauberville
Mathieu Forget - www.youtube.com/@Forgetmat

Paroles :
Dansons, au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
et les bas fonds quittons
volons, valsons
 
Dansons, quand le monde vacille
sur un pas, sur un fil
à nos corps emmêlés,
nos mains nouées
 
Pour oublier nos peines
Que rien ne nous retienne, (ne nous retienne)
 
Dansons, au-dessus des grands vides
que nos souffles nous guident
les corps à l’unisson
jouez violons
 
Dansons, ce soir il y a bal
au milieu des étoiles,
envers et contre nous
doux rendez-vous
 
Flottons, front contre front
Flocons, sur l’horizon (flocons sur l'horizon)
 
Dansons pour être et rester droits
Parce qu’on se le doit
Pour tous les immobiles
Tous les sans voix ni loi
Parce que c’est inutile
Parce que toi et moi
Nos visages, nos bras
Malgré tout puisqu’on ne peut danser que debout
 
Dansons, inventons nos vertiges
avant que l’on se fige
quand l’univers hostile
une idylle, une île
 
Dansons au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
tournons puisque le monde
ne tourne plus rond

snippet.title: Morgan Luna - You Are My Heaven - Blues Music - Soul Blues
snippet.description:
In the quiet glow of a love that heals without asking, “You Are My Heaven” by Morgan Luna unfolds as a deeply emotional Soul Blues experience. This is a song about finding peace in another soul—where everything restless finally comes to rest.

With a tender and heartfelt vocal performance, the track moves like a soft confession carried through the night. The guitar answers with slow, expressive phrasing, while Rhodes and organ wrap each moment in warmth, creating a cinematic atmosphere filled with intimacy and grace.

“You Are My Heaven” captures a rare kind of love—one that doesn’t overwhelm, but gently transforms. It’s not about grand promises or dramatic passion, but about quiet connection, emotional safety, and the feeling of finally being home.

This is modern blues at its most soulful and comforting: deep, warm, and profoundly human.

If you’ve ever found someone who feels like peace… this song belongs to you.

https://morganluna.com/

snippet.title: Brooks & Dunn - Neon Moon
snippet.description:
Brooks & Dunn - Neon Moon
Stream/Download:

(Lyrics):
[Verse 1]
When the sun goes down on my side of town
That lonesome feelin' comes to my door
And the whole world turns
Blue

[Verse 2]
There's a rundown bar 'cross the railroad tracks
I've got a table for two, way in the back
Where I sit alone
And think of losin' you

[Pre-Chorus]
I spend most every night
Beneath the light of a neon moon

[Chorus]
Now if you lose your one and only
There's always room here for the lonely
To watch your broken dreams dance
In and out of the beams of a neon moon

[Verse 3]
I think of two young lovers, runnin' wild and free
I close my eyes and sometimes see
You in the shadows
Of this smoke-filled room

[Verse 4]
No tellin' how many tears I've sat here and cried
Or how many lies that I've lied
Tellin' my poor heart
She'll come back someday

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, but I'll be alright
As long as there's light from a neon moon

[Chorus]
Oh, if you lose your one and only
There's always room here for the lonely
To watch your broken dreams dance
In and out of the beams of a neon moon

[Verse 5]
The jukebox plays on, drink by drink
And the words of every sad song seem to say what I think
And this hurt inside of me
Ain't never gonna end

[Pre-Chorus]
Oh, but I'll be alright
As long as there's light from a neon moon

[Chorus]
Oh, if you lose your one and only
There's always room here for the lonely
To watch your broken dreams dance in and out of the beams
Of a neon moon

[Outro]
Come watch your broken dreams dance
In and out of the beams of a neon moon
Oh, watch your broken dreams dance
In and out of the beams of a neon moon

snippet.title: Avengers: Doomsday CinemaCon Trailer LEAKED! Trailer of DOOM Full Breakdown
snippet.description:
🚨 SPOILER WARNING! 🚨

The Avengers: Doomsday CinemaCon trailer has finally leaked… and it’s insane 😱

Even though it hasn’t officially released online yet, we now have a full description — and here’s everything you need to know.

(Full credit to New Rockstars for the details.)

The trailer starts with Professor X reacting to an explosion at the X-Mansion…

Then we hear Doctor Doom (Robert Downey Jr.) warning about an unthinkable decision — and because of his changed voice, the Avengers may not even recognize him.

Then it gets crazy.

Doctor Doom lands in the X-Mansion courtyard
Gambit vs Shang-Chi fight
Mystique vs Yelena (shapeshift battle)
Possible X-Men vs Avengers conflict

We also see:

Thor leading the Avengers with a powerful speech
A new Avengers Tower with the New Avengers logo
The desert scene revealed as the ocean split by Namor
Fantastic Four meeting Wakandans

And then the biggest moment…

Thor says: “We need a miracle.”

And Mjolnir flies into the hands of Steve Rogers — now with long hair 😱

This could be one of the biggest MCU movies ever.   #AvengersDoomsday #doctordoom #robertdowneyjr #AvengersDoomsday

snippet.title: Kala Tikka (Official Video) | Mankirt Aulakh | Sardar Khehra | Gurshawan | Sukh Sanghera
snippet.description:
Times Music presents the official video of Kala Tikka 🎶✨, a Punjabi love song by Mankirt Aulakh featuring Sardar Khehra, with Sim Khurme as the female lead.

Kala Tikka beautifully captures a heartfelt emotion rooted in tradition, in which a lover asks his beloved to wear a kala tikka to protect her from nazar (the evil eye). Blending romance with cultural sentiment, this Punjabi song stands out for its meaningful lyrics, soothing melody, & emotional storytelling. 💫

With its strong desi vibe, Kala Tikka is perfect for fans of Punjabi romantic songs & love songs. The chemistry, visuals, and music come together to create a song that feels both modern and deeply rooted with its meaningful lyrics.

🎧 If you enjoy songs about love, care, and protection, Kala Tikka is a must-listen. Add it to your playlist and feel the emotion behind every word.

The circle of trust just got bigger. Focker-In-Law is in theaters this Thanksgiving. 
 ______  

This November, comedy icon and Emmy winner Ben Stiller and two-time Oscar® winner Robert De Niro reunite, joined by Grammy winner and Oscar® nominee Ariana Grande, in Focker-In-Law, a new chapter in the blockbuster Meet the Parents franchise.
 
Written and directed by John Hamburg, who co-wrote the three previous Meet the Parents films, Focker-In-Law is produced by Oscar® nominee Jane Rosenthal and Robert De Niro for Tribeca Productions; Ben Stiller and Oscar® winner John Lesher for Red Hour Films; Emmy winner Jay Roach for Delirious Media; and John Hamburg for Particular Pictures.

snippet.title: Metro 2039 - Reveal Trailer | PS5 Games
snippet.description:
Wishlist METRO 2039  
https://store.playstation.com/concept/10009337

Journey into the dark heart of the Metro  

METRO 2039 takes you to the dark heart of the Moscow Metro where the last survivors of the nuclear apocalypse cling to existence in the tunnels and subways of the ruined city, hope is lost… the future looks bleak... if there is one.  

Sign up for the latest news delivered to your inbox so you don’t miss out on the latest METRO roundups. 

We are thrilled to officially unveil the next mainline METRO title from 4A Games  - METRO 2039, coming to PlayStation 5 this winter. 

Join us on our darkest journey yet, as our protagonist – “The Stranger” hurtles through a loop of a never-ending nightmare, never certain of what is real.  Watch until the end for heart-pounding in-engine gameplay and cinematics from METRO 2039. 

Keep your radios tuned to the official METRO social media channels and newsletter for more updates, trailers and news. Follow us here on YouTube for the latest video content. 

#ps5 #ps5games #Metro2039 #4AGames #DeepSilver
